caption: A man with glasses is performing, singing into a microphone while playing an acoustic guitar. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt under a dark vest decorated with blue floral embroidery and a red and white patterned accessory at the collar. He stands in front of a wall with horizontal blinds. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are visible, suggesting an audience. To the right of the performer, the text "ORCA" appears on the screen. Across the sequence, the man remains in a consistent position, with slight variations in his facial expressions and mouth movement as he sings. The camera remains static, and the composition of the scene stays the same throughout the frames, capturing the man's performance from a medium shot.
